title: lussacia incana
intro: Lussacia incana, also known as the Eastern White Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant in the heath family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lussacia incana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections, as well as being used to support digestive health. Lussacia incana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
